hero.subtitle: We create websites, chatbots and platforms for local businesses that want to grow without losing their essence

manifesto.label: Our Philosophy
manifesto.quote1: Most agencies build websites that look the same. We build technology that
manifesto.description: Your restaurant has years of tradition? We'll make the website honor that. Your shop is the heart of the neighborhood? Your website will be too. Technology shouldn't erase identity —

services.label: Services
services.title: Everything you need to
services.subtitle: Complete solutions for your digital presence
services.customWebsitesShort: Websites that reflect your business's unique identity. Responsive, fast and built to convert.
services.consultativeChatbotsShort: Intelligent assistants that qualify leads 24/7 with your brand's voice.
services.saasShort: Custom web applications for your business's unique operations.
services.digitalMarketingShort: SEO, ads, content and social media. We don't just build — we help you grow.
services.maintenanceShort: Ongoing support to keep your digital presence running smoothly.

portfolio.label: Our Journey
portfolio.title: The evolution of
portfolio.subtitle: Own products and client projects that show how we build technology with identity.

easyline.tagline: Complete e-commerce for queue management leader
easyline.description: E-commerce platform with interactive 3D homepage, AI pedestal calculator, admin dashboard with CRM and WhatsApp checkout integration.
easyline.outcome: 100% independent platform with AI lead qualification

plate.tagline: Complete platform for restaurants: from menu to take away
plate.description: Digital menu with photos and dish descriptions, online reservation system with automatic confirmation, online orders with delivery and takeaway management, and WhatsApp integration for direct contact and orders.
plate.outcome: Restaurants with complete digital presence and increased orders

agendamento.description: Scheduling system with AI, automatic reminders, client portal, payment integration and analytics dashboard.

milan.description: Secondary vehicle liquidation system developed for Milan, an auction company. Platform that streamlines the car selling and liquidation process, with lot management, online catalog and real-time tracking.
milan.outcome: Digitalized liquidation process with complete lot management

process.label: Process
process.title: How we
process.discoveryShort: We learn your story, audience and goals
process.discoveryDetail: We dive into your business to understand what makes it unique. Interviews, market analysis and clear goal setting before writing a single line of code.
process.strategyShort: We design technology that fits your identity
process.strategyDetail: Wireframes, technical architecture and content strategy aligned with your brand. Every design decision serves your story.
process.buildShort: We build with quality, speed and transparency
process.buildDetail: Agile development with weekly deliveries. You follow every step and can give feedback in real time. Clean, tested and documented code.
process.growthShort: We support and optimize as you grow
process.growthDetail: Launch is just the beginning. We monitor performance, optimize conversions and evolve your platform as your business grows.

quotes.quote: LIPE didn't just build our website — they told our story in a way we never could before.
quotes.author: Maria S.

quotes.quote: Our chatbot qualifies clients while we sleep. It's like having a 24/7 salesperson who knows every detail of the business.
quotes.author: Carlos R.

quotes.quote: They turned our neighborhood shop into an e-commerce that delivers to 12 cities. Without losing our identity.
quotes.author: Ana L.

quotes.quote: The scheduling system reduced conflicts by 60%. I save 2 hours a day. Best investment I've made.
quotes.author: Pedro M.
